name: Yard Sign Zealot
text:
Haste
When Yard Sign Zealot enters the battlefield, create three Lawn Sign tokens. (A Lawn Sign is a red artifact with "Attacking Goblins you control get +1/+0 for each Lawn Sign you control.")
Whenever Yard Sign Zealot attacks, you may sacrifice a Lawn Sign. If you do, draw a card.
flavorText: He doesn't change minds, but he sure does change yards.
